task_completion.description: Verify the Trapezoidal fin set was upgraded to the correct thickness and cross-section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the fin configuration window in OpenRocket. The 'Thickness' field must be set to 6.35 mm (or 0.635 cm) and the 'Cross section' dropdown must be set to 'Airfoil'.

task_completion.description: Verify a flight simulation was run to check performance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket. There should be evidence of a completed simulation run, such as a green checkmark, populated flight data (apogee, velocity, etc.), or an open simulation plot window.

task_completion.description: Verify the upgraded design was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or a file manager window showing the file 'upgraded_fins.ork' located in the '~/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 3D geometry was exported as a Wavefront OBJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog or file manager window showing the file 'rocket_3d.obj' located in the '~/Documents/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the design report was exported as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a print/export dialog or file manager window showing the file 'design_report.pdf' located in the '~/Documents/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the fin templates were exported as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a print/export dialog or file manager window showing the file 'fin_templates.pdf' located in the '~/Documents/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the OpenRocket application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the files were genuinely exported from OpenRocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for OpenRocket's native 'Export', 'Print', or 'Save' dialog boxes being used to generate the .obj and .pdf files, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' creating empty files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the application workflow using the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent didn't simply rename or copy existing files to match the expected output names without actually modifying the design in OpenRocket.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target fin thickness is exactly 6.35 mm (0.00635 m) and the cross-section must be 'Airfoil'. The required output files and paths are: 1) Upgraded design: '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/upgraded_fins.ork', 2) 3D geometry: '/home/ga/Documents/exports/rocket_3d.obj', 3) Design report: '/home/ga/Documents/exports/design_report.pdf', 4) Fin templates: '/home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_templates.pdf'.
